name: local_file_open
description: Open a provided local file path in Windows Explorer with allowlist validation and path safety checks.
author: AnythingllmSkills

examples.prompt: 幫我在 Explorer 定位這個檔案：C:\Users\USER\Downloads\gpt-oss-20b-modelfile.txt

filePath.description: Required. Absolute or relative local file path to validate and open in Windows Explorer.

path.description: Alias of filePath for compatibility with MCP tool calls.

openExplorer.description: Optional. Defaults to true. Set false to only validate path and allowlist without opening Explorer.

allowlistRoots.description: Optional allowlist root paths. If omitted, LOCAL_FILE_SEARCH_ALLOWLIST is used when available.
